title: I have open-sourced gojaja, a CLI for local multi-agent collaboration
abstract:
gojaja is a local CLI tool featuring collaborative multiple AI Agents, supporting calls across clients such as Cursor, Claude Code and Codex.

## Core Features - Real-time dashboard, RFC and inbox - All messages and events are stored locally as files with no remote server, keeping all data entirely
abstract_zh: gojaja，本地多AI代理协作的小帮手！就像组织一桌乱炖大餐，Cursor、Claude Code和Codex都来凑热闹。它自带实时动态板，RFC讨论区和收件箱，所有聊天记录全存本地，再也不怕云端丢文件了。快来试试吧，让你的AI小伙伴们高效玩转协作！
